base_prompt: Pixel-art sprite of title_screen — a ui (menu_screen) from 1991 sonic the hedgehog. Sonic 1 title screen with Sonic finger-wagging animation. Centered on magenta (#FF00FF) background, 8-bit or 16-bit pixel-art aesthetic, no anti-aliasing, chunky pixels. Single canonical pose (frame 0 of animation).
source_progression_description: Sonic 1 title screen with Sonic finger-wagging animation
